Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Karoshan Alliance]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Karoshan Alliance has put out a call for mages to seal a potential D’Niss incursion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Karoshan Alliance is one of the major powers in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Karoshan Alliance provides reports to Sola.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Karoshan Alliance is one of the four corners of the galaxy.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Visiria is part of the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The Karoshan Alliance previously cobbled together a fleet with the Galactic Union and Starhammer to kill the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The Karoshan Alliance is a political entity or alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The Titan Force were not enemies with the Karoshan Alliance.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Karoshan Alliance is a mutual enemy of the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Solstice has contacted the Karoshan Alliance for an official research partnership.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The Karoshan Alliance is a group that the Galactic Union might target.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
